purpose: Make Cloudflare Worker URL save/check actions visibly confirmable and persistent in hybrid.html.
checks_after_upload: Click URL 저장 and confirm URL 저장 완료
Click Worker 확인 and confirm hasOpenAIKey=true
Refresh page and confirm URL is restored
notes: OpenAI API key is still stored only in Cloudflare Secret, not in browser files.
Worker connection UI is independent from the main diagnosis engine initialization.
